name: bug_triage_agent
description: Bug triage agent for analyzing and prioritizing bug reports. Classifies severity, priority, identifies affected components, analyzes root causes, and generates reproduction steps with actionable recommendations.

environment_variables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: OpenAI API key for GPT models

environment_variables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: Anthropic API key for Claude models

example_usage:
```python
import asyncio
from bug_triage import (
    triage_bug,
    quick_severity_check,
    get_reproduction_steps
)

async def main():
    bug_report = """
    Title: Login fails with 500 error when using Google OAuth
    
    Description:
    Users are reporting they cannot log in using Google OAuth.
    When they click the "Sign in with Google" button, they get redirected
    to Google, authenticate successfully, but then get a 500 Internal Server Error
    when redirected back to our app.
    
    Error in logs:
    TypeError: Cannot read property 'email' of undefined
    at /api/auth/google/callback:45
    
    Started happening after yesterday's deployment.
    Affects approximately 30% of login attempts.
    """
    
    # Full bug triage
    result = await triage_bug(
        bug_report=bug_report,
        context="Recent deployment included OAuth provider updates",
        include_recommendations=True
    )
    
    print(f"=== Bug Triage Results ===")
    print(f"\nSummary: {result.summary}")
    print(f"\nSeverity: {result.severity_classification.severity}")
    print(f"Priority: {result.severity_classification.priority}")
    print(f"Impact Scope: {result.severity_classification.impact_scope}")
    print(f"\nComponent: {result.component.component_name}")
    print(f"Type: {result.component.component_type}")
    print(f"Confidence: {result.component.confidence}")
    
    print(f"\nRoot Cause: {result.root_cause.likely_cause}")
    print(f"Category: {result.root_cause.cause_category}")
    print(f"Confidence: {result.root_cause.confidence}")
    
    print(f"\n--- Reproduction Steps ---")
    for i, step in enumerate(result.reproduction.steps, 1):
        print(f"{i}. {step}")
    print(f"Reproducibility: {result.reproduction.reproducibility}")
    
    print(f"\nRecommended Assignee: {result.recommended_assignee}")
    print(f"Estimated Effort: {result.estimated_effort}")
    
    print(f"\n--- Recommendations ---")
    for rec in result.recommendations:
        print(f"  - {rec}")
    
    print(f"\nTags: {', '.join(result.tags)}")
    
    # Quick severity check
    print("\n=== Quick Severity Check ===")
    severity_info = await quick_severity_check(bug_report)
    print(f"Severity: {severity_info['severity']}")
    print(f"Priority: {severity_info['priority']}")
    print(f"Component: {severity_info['component']}")
    print(f"Impact: {severity_info['impact']}")
    
    # Get reproduction steps only
    print("\n=== Reproduction Steps ===")
    repro = await get_reproduction_steps(bug_report)
    print(f"Reproducibility: {repro['reproducibility']}")
    for i, step in enumerate(repro['steps'], 1):
        print(f"{i}. {step}")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    asyncio.run(main())
```
post_add_instructions: This agent analyzes bug reports to classify severity, priority, identify affected components, analyze root causes, and generate reproduction steps. It helps engineering teams triage bugs efficiently by providing structured analysis with actionable recommendations. Use context parameter to provide additional information like recent deployments or known issues. The agent supports multiple bug categories including logic errors, race conditions, security issues, and more. Set your preferred LLM provider's API key (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.).
